llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Shares fell sharply after weak Q4 business update; weaker like-for-like (LFL) growth momentum in India (Domino's India recorded LFL growth of 0.2%); analysts expect India operating margin to come under pressure.

Recommended as 'BUY' by Sagar Doshi. Stock has been consolidating constructively, hasn’t participated in broader market downtrend, taken support at its 21-day EMA, expected to move 8-10% in quick time.

Recommended as 'BUY' by Sagar Doshi. Stock has been digesting gains and consolidating around its 20 DMA, showing immense strength, within 15% distance of all-time high levels, and showing signs of accumulation, expected 8-10% gain.

Recommended as 'BUY' by Sagar Doshi. Stock is witnessing strong volumes on an up-day vs down day (a strong sign of accumulation), has not participated in broader market downtrend, and shown immense signs of strength, target for a new all-time high.

Private fuel retailers and commercial segments saw price hikes, while state-run OMCs (like IOCL) held regular auto fuel prices steady due to Centre's excise duty cuts. IOCL raised high-octane XP100 petrol price and commercial LPG/industrial diesel prices to offset crude costs.
